name: Better Than Better-Than-Sex Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a 9x13-inch baking pan.
2. Mix butter and sugar until fluffy. Gradually add flour, mixing at low speed until the mixture is pebbly and can be pressed together. Press into the prepared pan and bake for 20 minutes or until golden. Cool completely.
3. For pudding: Beat egg yolks in a bowl. Whisk sugar, flour, and milk in a medium saucepan until lump-free. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly with a wooden spatula, just to a boil. Remove from heat and whisk a small amount of the hot mixture into the yolks. Pour back into the saucepan and whisk well. Continue cooking 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly until thick.
4. Add vanilla and butter to the pudding; stir until butter melts. If lumps form, strain through a fine-mesh sieve. Chill with plastic wrap pressed directly on the surface.
5. Beat cream cheese, sugar, vanilla, and lemon juice until blended. Whip 1 cup cream to medium peaks. Fold a scoop of whipped cream into the beaten cheese, then fold in remaining cream. Set aside.
6. Whip the remaining 1 1/2 cups cream with sugar and vanilla until stiff peaks form.
7. Spread crust with cream cheese mixture, top with pineapple, then drizzle with caramel or chocolate sauce. Spread pudding over pineapple and spread whipped cream evenly over pudding. Chill well before serving.
8. For glaze: Melt chocolate and butter over low heat, stirring until smooth. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla. Drizzle zigzags across the cake's surface.
